meta.title: Qup Pulse — what's happening right around you
meta.description: Qup Pulse is the local pulse of your neighbourhood. Post to the people near you, see what's happening right now. Coming soon to iOS and Android.

hero.subhead: Qup Pulse is the local pulse of your neighbourhood. Post to the people actually near you, see what's going on right now, and skip the endless feed of strangers on the other side of the world.

local.title: Local by default
local.body: Your feed is the area around you, not a global timeline. What you see is what's actually nearby.

now.title: Right now
now.body: Posts are about the present moment. See what happens as it happens, from the people sharing your space.

safety.title: Built for safety
safety.body: Report and block in a tap, real moderation behind it, and your exact location is never shown to others.

download.title: Launching soon on both stores
download.body: Qup Pulse is in review now. Join the waitlist and we'll send you the link the day it's live.

login.notAdmin: That account is not an administrator.
